+# Recommendation Service
+
+A microservice project containing:
+
+- **Backend**: Spring Boot 3.4.2 (Java 21) ŌĆö `src/main/java`. Provides recommendation APIs backed by PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch, Redis, and Kafka.
+- **Frontend**: React 18 + Tailwind app ŌĆö `frontend/`. Calls the backend at `http://localhost:8026`.
+- **Infra**: Kubernetes manifests (`k8s/`), Prometheus configs (`monitoring/`), GitHub Actions CI (`.github/workflows/main.yml`).
+
+## Replit Environment Setup
+
+Only the **frontend** is run inside this Repl, because the backend depends on external infrastructure (PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch, Redis, Kafka) that is not available in the Replit container.
+
+### Frontend (port 5000)
+
+- Workflow: `Start application` runs `cd frontend && npm start`.
+- `frontend/.env` sets `HOST=0.0.0.0`, `PORT=5000`, and `DANGEROUSLY_DISABLE_HOST_CHECK=true` so the Create React App dev server binds to all interfaces and accepts the proxied host header used by the Replit preview iframe.
+- `WDS_SOCKET_PORT=0` lets the HMR websocket reuse the proxied URL.
+- Backend API base URL defaults to `http://localhost:8026` (see `frontend/src/services/RecommendationService.js`). Until the backend is reachable, network calls will fail and the UI will display "Failed to load recommendations" ŌĆö that is expected.
+
+### Backend (not started here)
+
+To run the Spring Boot service you need a JDK 21 runtime plus PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch, Redis, and Kafka. Use the dev profile (`SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=dev`) for the H2 in-memory DB, but Elasticsearch/Redis/Kafka must still be reachable. Typical local commands:
+
+```bash
+./mvnw spring-boot:run -Dspring-boot.run.profiles=dev
+```
+
+## Deployment
+
+Configured as a **static** deployment that builds the React app:
+
+- Build: `cd frontend && npm install && npm run build`
+- Public dir: `frontend/build`
+
+A static deployment cannot serve the Java backend; deploy that separately (e.g. via the included Kubernetes manifests) if you need the live API.
+
+## Project Layout
+
+```
+src/main/java/com/example/recommendationservice/
+  config/        Spring configuration (Elasticsearch, Kafka, Redis, OpenAPI)
+  consumer/      Kafka consumers
+  controller/    REST controllers
+  model/         DTOs and entity models
+  repository/    Spring Data repositories
+  service/       Business logic
+frontend/
+  src/components/  React UI components
+  src/services/    API client
+k8s/, monitoring/, .github/workflows/   Infra and CI
+```
--

+#### ąŁąĮą┤ą┐ąŠąĖąĮčéčŗ `/api/recommendations`
+
+- `GET /{userId}?page=&size=` ŌĆö ą┐ąĄčĆčüąŠąĮą░ą╗ąĖąĘąĖčĆąŠą▓ą░ąĮąĮčŗą╣ čüą┐ąĖčüąŠą║ čéąŠą▓ą░čĆąŠą▓. ąæąĄčĆčæčé ą╗čÄą▒ąĖą╝čāčÄ ą║ą░čéąĄą│ąŠčĆąĖčÄ ą┐ąŠą╗čīąĘąŠą▓ą░čéąĄą╗čÅ ąĖąĘ Redis (`user:{id}:fav_category`) ąĖ ą▓ąŠąĘą▓čĆą░čēą░ąĄčé čéąŠą▓ą░čĆčŗ ąĖąĘ ąĮąĄčæ; ąĖąĮą░čćąĄ ŌĆö ą▓čüąĄ čéąŠą▓ą░čĆčŗ.
+- `GET /popular?limit=` ŌĆö čéąŠą┐ čéąŠą▓ą░čĆąŠą▓ ą┐ąŠ ą░ą│čĆąĄą│ą░čåąĖąĖ ą┤ąĄą╣čüčéą▓ąĖą╣. ąÆ production ŌĆö čćąĄčĆąĄąĘ Elasticsearch terms aggregation; ą▓ `replit`-ą┐čĆąŠčäąĖą╗ąĄ, ąĄčüą╗ąĖ ES ą▓ąĄčĆąĮčāą╗ ą┐čāčüčéąŠ, ą▓čŗą┐ąŠą╗ąĮčÅąĄčéčüčÅ fallback-ą░ą│čĆąĄą│ą░čåąĖčÅ ą┐ąŠ `ActionRepository`.
+- `GET /trending?limit=` ŌĆö čéąŠ ąČąĄ čüą░ą╝ąŠąĄ, ąĮąŠ čćąĄčĆąĄąĘ `EnhancedRecommendationService` (in-memory ą┐ąŠą┤čüčćčæčé `view`/`like`).
+- `GET /{userId}/content-based?limit=` ŌĆö čĆąĄą║ąŠą╝ąĄąĮą┤ą░čåąĖąĖ ąĮą░ ąŠčüąĮąŠą▓ąĄ ą┐čĆąĄą┤ą┐ąŠčćąĖčéą░ąĄą╝čŗčģ ą║ą░čéąĄą│ąŠčĆąĖą╣ ąĖąĘ Redis-čģąĄčłą░ `user:{id}:category_preferences`. ąśčüą║ą╗čÄčćą░ąĄčé čāąČąĄ ą┐čĆąŠčüą╝ąŠčéčĆąĄąĮąĮčŗąĄ čéąŠą▓ą░čĆčŗ.
+- `GET /{userId}/collaborative?limit=` ŌĆö collaborative filtering: ąĖčēąĄčé ą┐ąŠą╗čīąĘąŠą▓ą░čéąĄą╗ąĄą╣ čü ą┐ąĄčĆąĄčüąĄą║ą░čÄčēąĖą╝ąĖčüčÅ ą┤ąĄą╣čüčéą▓ąĖčÅą╝ąĖ ąĖ čĆąĄą║ąŠą╝ąĄąĮą┤čāąĄčé ąĖčģ čéąŠą▓ą░čĆčŗ, ą║ąŠčéąŠčĆčŗąĄ čéąĄą║čāčēąĖą╣ ą┐ąŠą╗čīąĘąŠą▓ą░čéąĄą╗čī ąĄčēčæ ąĮąĄ ą▓ąĖą┤ąĄą╗.
+
+#### ąŁąĮą┤ą┐ąŠąĖąĮčéčŗ `/api/actions`

+- `POST /` ŌĆö čäąĖą║čüąĖčĆčāąĄčé ą┤ąĄą╣čüčéą▓ąĖąĄ ą┐ąŠą╗čīąĘąŠą▓ą░čéąĄą╗čÅ (`view`, `like`, `purchase`) ąĖ ąŠą▒ąĮąŠą▓ą╗čÅąĄčé Redis-ą┐čĆąĄą┤ą┐ąŠčćčéąĄąĮąĖčÅ.
+- `GET /user/{userId}` ŌĆö ąĖčüčéąŠčĆąĖčÅ ą┤ąĄą╣čüčéą▓ąĖą╣ ą┐ąŠą╗čīąĘąŠą▓ą░čéąĄą╗čÅ.

+## ąöąĄą╝ąŠąĮčüčéčĆą░čåąĖąŠąĮąĮčŗąĄ ą┤ą░ąĮąĮčŗąĄ (ą┐čĆąŠčäąĖą╗čī replit)
+
+ąÜą░ąČą┤čŗą╣ ąĖąĘ ą┐čÅčéąĖ ą┐ąŠą╗čīąĘąŠą▓ą░čéąĄą╗ąĄą╣ ąĖą╝ąĄąĄčé ąŠčüąĮąŠą▓ąĮčāčÄ ąĖ ą┐ąŠą▒ąŠčćąĮčāčÄ ą║ą░čéąĄą│ąŠčĆąĖčÄ ąĖąĮčéąĄčĆąĄčüąŠą▓; ┬½ą▓ąĖą┤ąĄą╗┬╗ čéąŠą╗čīą║ąŠ 2 ąĖąĘ 4 čéąŠą▓ą░čĆąŠą▓ ąŠčüąĮąŠą▓ąĮąŠą╣ ą║ą░čéąĄą│ąŠčĆąĖąĖ ąĖ 1 čéąŠą▓ą░čĆ ą┐ąŠą▒ąŠčćąĮąŠą╣. ąŁčéąŠ ą┤ą░čæčé čĆąĄą░ą╗čīąĮčŗąĄ čĆąĄąĘčāą╗čīčéą░čéčŗ ą▓ąŠ ą▓čüąĄčģ čĆąĄąČąĖą╝ą░čģ čĆąĄą║ąŠą╝ąĄąĮą┤ą░čåąĖą╣:
+
+| User  | Primary       | Secondary     |
+|-------|---------------|---------------|
+| user1 | Electronics   | Books         |
+| user2 | Books         | Electronics   |
+| user3 | Fashion       | Sports        |
+| user4 | Home & Garden | Fashion       |
+| user5 | Sports        | Books         |

+## CI/CD

+ążą░ą╣ą╗ `.github/workflows/main.yml`. ąśčüą┐čĆą░ą▓ą╗ąĄąĮąĖąĄ, ą▓ąĮąĄčüčæąĮąĮąŠąĄ ą▓ čŹčéąŠą╝ ąŠą║čĆčāąČąĄąĮąĖąĖ:
+
+- **ą©ą░ą│ ┬½Generate SBOM and scan┬╗ (čéąĄą┐ąĄčĆčī ┬½Build local image for scanning┬╗)**: Docker buildx čü `--sbom=true` čüąŠąĘą┤ą░čæčé OCI image index (manifest list), ą░ čäą╗ą░ą│ `--load` ąĮąĄ čāą╝ąĄąĄčé ąĘą░ą│čĆčāąČą░čéčī manifest list ą▓ ą╗ąŠą║ą░ą╗čīąĮčŗą╣ ą┤ąĄą╝ąŠąĮ Docker (`docker exporter does not currently support exporting manifest lists`). ąĀąĄčłąĄąĮąĖąĄ: čÅą▓ąĮąŠ ąŠčéą║ą╗čÄčćąĖą╗ąĖ SBOM (`--sbom=false`) ą┤ą╗čÅ čłą░ą│ą░ čüą║ą░ąĮąĖčĆąŠą▓ą░ąĮąĖčÅ, ąŠčüčéą░ą▓ąĖą▓ `--load`, `--platform=linux/amd64`, `--provenance=false`. ą¤ąŠą╗ąĮąŠčåąĄąĮąĮčŗą╣ multi-platform ąŠą▒čĆą░ąĘ + SBOM ą│ąĄąĮąĄčĆąĖčĆčāčÄčéčüčÅ ąĮą░ ąŠčéą┤ąĄą╗čīąĮąŠą╝ čłą░ą│ąĄ ą┐čāą▒ą╗ąĖą║ą░čåąĖąĖ.
 
 ## Deployment
 
-Configured as a **static** deployment that builds the React app:
+ąØą░čüčéčĆąŠąĄąĮ ą║ą░ą║ **static** deployment, čüąŠą▒ąĖčĆą░čÄčēąĖą╣ React-ą┐čĆąĖą╗ąŠąČąĄąĮąĖąĄ:
 
 - Build: `cd frontend && npm install && npm run build`
 - Public dir: `frontend/build`
 
-A static deployment cannot serve the Java backend; deploy that separately (e.g. via the included Kubernetes manifests) if you need the live API.
+Static deployment ąĮąĄ ąĘą░ą┐čāčüą║ą░ąĄčé Java-ą▒čŹą║ąĄąĮą┤ ŌĆö ąĄą│ąŠ ąĮčāąČąĮąŠ ą┐čāą▒ą╗ąĖą║ąŠą▓ą░čéčī ąŠčéą┤ąĄą╗čīąĮąŠ (ąĮą░ą┐čĆąĖą╝ąĄčĆ, čćąĄčĆąĄąĘ Kubernetes-ą╝ą░ąĮąĖčäąĄčüčéčŗ ą▓ `k8s/`) ąĄčüą╗ąĖ čéčĆąĄą▒čāąĄčéčüčÅ ąČąĖą▓ąŠą╣ API ą▓ ą┐čĆąŠą┤ą░ą║čłąĄąĮąĄ. ąÆąĮčāčéčĆąĖ Replit ą┤ą╗čÅ čĆą░ąĘčĆą░ą▒ąŠčéą║ąĖ ąĖčüą┐ąŠą╗čīąĘčāąĄčéčüčÅ ą┐čĆąŠčäąĖą╗čī `replit` čü in-memory ąĘą░ą╝ąĄąĮą░ą╝ąĖ.
 
-## Project Layout
+## ąŚą░ą▓ąĖčüąĖą╝ąŠčüčéąĖ
 
-```
-src/main/java/com/example/recommendationservice/
-  config/        Spring configuration (Elasticsearch, Kafka, Redis, OpenAPI)
-  consumer/      Kafka consumers
-  controller/    REST controllers
-  model/         DTOs and entity models
-  repository/    Spring Data repositories
-  service/       Business logic
-frontend/
-  src/components/  React UI components
-  src/services/    API client
-k8s/, monitoring/, .github/workflows/   Infra and CI
-```
+- `pom.xml`: H2 ą┐ąĄčĆąĄą▓ąĄą┤čæąĮ čüąŠ scope `test` ąĮą░ `runtime` (čüčéčĆąŠą║ą░ 85ŌĆō94), čćčéąŠą▒čŗ ą┤čĆą░ą╣ą▓ąĄčĆ ą▒čŗą╗ ą┤ąŠčüčéčāą┐ąĄąĮ JPA ą┐čĆąĖ ą░ą║čéąĖą▓ąĮąŠą╝ ą┐čĆąŠčäąĖą╗ąĄ `replit`. Mockito/Spring-test ąŠčüčéą░ą╗ąĖčüčī ą▓ `test`.
+- Java 21 čāčüčéą░ąĮą░ą▓ą╗ąĖą▓ą░ąĄčéčüčÅ čćąĄčĆąĄąĘ NixOS package `jdk21`; `JAVA_HOME` ąĘą░ą┤ą░čæčéčüčÅ ą▓ ą║ąŠą╝ą░ąĮą┤ąĄ workflow, ą┐ąŠčéąŠą╝čā čćčéąŠ ą╝ąŠą┤čāą╗čī `java-graalvm22.3` ą┐ąŠčüčéą░ą▓ą╗čÅąĄčé čéąŠą╗čīą║ąŠ Java 19.
+
+## Recent Changes (April 2026)
+
+- ąöąŠą▒ą░ą▓ą╗ąĄąĮ ą┐čĆąŠčäąĖą╗čī Spring `replit`: H2 + 5 ą║ą╗ą░čüčüąŠą▓ ą▓ ą┐ą░ą║ąĄčéąĄ `replit/`, ąŠą▒ąĄčüą┐ąĄčćąĖą▓ą░čÄčēąĖčģ in-memory čĆą░ą▒ąŠčéčā ą▒ąĄąĘ PostgreSQL/Elasticsearch/Redis/Kafka.
+- `ElasticsearchConfig`, `EventConsumer`, `ProductSyncConsumer` ą┐ąŠą╝ąĄčćąĄąĮčŗ `@Profile("!replit")` ŌĆö ąĮąĄ ą┐ąŠą┤ąĮąĖą╝ą░čÄčéčüčÅ ą▓ Replit-ąŠą║čĆčāąČąĄąĮąĖąĖ.
+- `RecommendationService.getPopularProducts` čéąĄą┐ąĄčĆčī ąĖą╝ąĄąĄčé fallback ąĮą░ in-memory ą░ą│čĆąĄą│ą░čåąĖčÄ čćąĄčĆąĄąĘ `ActionRepository`, ąĄčüą╗ąĖ Elasticsearch ą▓ąĄčĆąĮčāą╗ ą┐čāčüčéąŠ ąĖą╗ąĖ ąĮąĄą┤ąŠčüčéčāą┐ąĄąĮ (ąĮčāąČąĮąŠ ą┤ą╗čÅ ą┐čĆąŠčäąĖą╗čÅ `replit`, ąĖ ąĮąĄ ą▓čĆąĄą┤ąĖčé production-ą┐ąŠą▓ąĄą┤ąĄąĮąĖčÄ).
+- `frontend/package.json`: ą┤ąŠą▒ą░ą▓ą╗ąĄąĮąŠ ą┐ąŠą╗ąĄ `"proxy": "http://localhost:8080"`.
+- `frontend/src/services/RecommendationService.js`: ąĖčüą┐ąŠą╗čīąĘčāąĄčé ąŠčéąĮąŠčüąĖčéąĄą╗čīąĮčŗąĄ URL (`process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL ?? ''`).
+- `.github/workflows/main.yml`: ąĖčüą┐čĆą░ą▓ą╗ąĄąĮ CI-čłą░ą│, ą║ąŠčéąŠčĆčŗą╣ ą┐ą░ą┤ą░ą╗ ąĮą░ ┬½docker exporter does not currently support exporting manifest lists┬╗.

         basePackages = "com.example.recommendationservice.repository"

diff --git a/src/main/java/com/example/recommendationservice/replit/InMemoryActionRepository.java b/src/main/java/com/example/recommendationservice/replit/InMemoryActionRepository.java
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..bda3ed2
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/main/java/com/example/recommendationservice/replit/InMemoryActionRepository.java
@@ -0,0 +1,172 @@
+package com.example.recommendationservice.replit;
+
+import com.example.recommendationservice.model.UserAction;
+import com.example.recommendationservice.repository.ActionRepository;
+import org.springframework.context.annotation.Profile;
+import org.springframework.data.domain.Page;
+import org.springframework.data.domain.PageImpl;
+import org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;
+import org.springframework.data.domain.Sort;
+import org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.RefreshPolicy;
+import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
+
+import java.util.ArrayList;
+import java.util.Collections;
+import java.util.List;
+import java.util.Map;
+import java.util.Optional;
+import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap;
+import java.util.stream.Collectors;
+
+/**
+ * In-memory implementation of {@link ActionRepository} for the {@code replit}
+ * profile. Backed by a {@link ConcurrentHashMap}; only the methods actually
+ * used by the service layer ({@link #findByUserId}, {@link #findByProductId},
+ * {@link #save}, {@link #findAll}) are implemented; the remaining
+ * {@link org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.repository.ElasticsearchRepository}
+ * methods throw {@link UnsupportedOperationException}.
+ */
+@Component
+@Profile("replit")
+public class InMemoryActionRepository implements ActionRepository {
+
+    private final Map<String, UserAction> store = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
+
+    @Override
+    public List<UserAction> findByUserId(String userId) {
+        return store.values().stream()
+                .filter(a -> userId != null && userId.equals(a.getUserId()))
+                .collect(Collectors.toList());
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public List<UserAction> findByProductId(String productId) {
+        return store.values().stream()
+                .filter(a -> productId != null && productId.equals(a.getProductId()))
+                .collect(Collectors.toList());
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public <S extends UserAction> S save(S entity) {
+        if (entity.getId() == null || entity.getId().isBlank()) {
+            throw new IllegalArgumentException("UserAction.id is required");
+        }
+        store.put(entity.getId(), entity);
+        return entity;
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public <S extends UserAction> Iterable<S> saveAll(Iterable<S> entities) {
+        List<S> saved = new ArrayList<>();
+        for (S e : entities) saved.add(save(e));
+        return saved;
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public Optional<UserAction> findById(String id) {
+        return Optional.ofNullable(store.get(id));
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public boolean existsById(String id) {
+        return store.containsKey(id);
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public Iterable<UserAction> findAll() {
+        return new ArrayList<>(store.values());
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public Iterable<UserAction> findAllById(Iterable<String> ids) {
+        List<UserAction> out = new ArrayList<>();
+        for (String id : ids) {
+            UserAction a = store.get(id);
+            if (a != null) out.add(a);
+        }
+        return out;
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public long count() {
+        return store.size();
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void deleteById(String id) {
+        store.remove(id);
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void delete(UserAction entity) {
+        if (entity != null && entity.getId() != null) store.remove(entity.getId());
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void deleteAllById(Iterable<? extends String> ids) {
+        ids.forEach(store::remove);
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void deleteAll(Iterable<? extends UserAction> entities) {
+        entities.forEach(this::delete);
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void deleteAll() {
+        store.clear();
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public Iterable<UserAction> findAll(Sort sort) {
+        return findAll();
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public Page<UserAction> findAll(Pageable pageable) {
+        List<UserAction> all = new ArrayList<>(store.values());
+        int from = (int) Math.min(pageable.getOffset(), all.size());
+        int to = Math.min(from + pageable.getPageSize(), all.size());
+        return new PageImpl<>(all.subList(from, to), pageable, all.size());
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public Page<UserAction> searchSimilar(UserAction entity, String[] fields, Pageable pageable) {
+        throw new UnsupportedOperationException("searchSimilar is not supported in the replit in-memory repository");
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void deleteAll(RefreshPolicy refreshPolicy) {
+        store.clear();
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void deleteAll(Iterable<? extends UserAction> entities, RefreshPolicy refreshPolicy) {
+        deleteAll(entities);
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void deleteAllById(Iterable<? extends String> ids, RefreshPolicy refreshPolicy) {
+        deleteAllById(ids);
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public <S extends UserAction> S save(S entity, RefreshPolicy refreshPolicy) {
+        return save(entity);
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public <S extends UserAction> Iterable<S> saveAll(Iterable<S> entities, RefreshPolicy refreshPolicy) {
+        return saveAll(entities);
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void deleteById(String id, RefreshPolicy refreshPolicy) {
+        deleteById(id);
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void delete(UserAction entity, RefreshPolicy refreshPolicy) {
+        delete(entity);
+    }
+}
diff --git a/src/main/java/com/example/recommendationservice/replit/InMemoryProductSearchRepository.java b/src/main/java/com/example/recommendationservice/replit/InMemoryProductSearchRepository.java
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..9792c4a
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/main/java/com/example/recommendationservice/replit/InMemoryProductSearchRepository.java
@@ -0,0 +1,183 @@
+package com.example.recommendationservice.replit;
+
+import com.example.recommendationservice.model.ProductDoc;
+import com.example.recommendationservice.repository.ProductSearchRepository;
+import org.springframework.context.annotation.Profile;
+import org.springframework.data.domain.Page;
+import org.springframework.data.domain.PageImpl;
+import org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;
+import org.springframework.data.domain.Sort;
+import org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.RefreshPolicy;
+import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
+
+import java.util.ArrayList;
+import java.util.Collections;
+import java.util.List;
+import java.util.Map;
+import java.util.Optional;
+import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap;
+import java.util.stream.Collectors;
+
+/**
+ * In-memory implementation of {@link ProductSearchRepository} used in the
+ * {@code replit} profile, where Spring Data Elasticsearch repositories are
+ * disabled. Only the methods that production code actually calls are
+ * implemented; the rest of the {@link org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.repository.ElasticsearchRepository}
+ * surface throws {@link UnsupportedOperationException} so that any unexpected
+ * usage fails fast and loudly.
+ */
+@Component
+@Profile("replit")
+public class InMemoryProductSearchRepository implements ProductSearchRepository {
+
+    private final Map<String, ProductDoc> store = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
+
+    @Override
+    public Page<ProductDoc> findByCategory(String category, Pageable pageable) {
+        List<ProductDoc> matches = store.values().stream()
+                .filter(p -> p.getCategory() != null && p.getCategory().equalsIgnoreCase(category))
+                .sorted((a, b) -> a.getId().compareTo(b.getId()))
+                .collect(Collectors.toList());
+        return paginate(matches, pageable);
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public List<ProductDoc> findAllByIdIn(List<String> ids) {
+        if (ids == null || ids.isEmpty()) return Collections.emptyList();
+        List<ProductDoc> result = new ArrayList<>(ids.size());
+        for (String id : ids) {
+            ProductDoc p = store.get(id);
+            if (p != null) result.add(p);
+        }
+        return result;
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public <S extends ProductDoc> S save(S entity) {
+        if (entity.getId() == null || entity.getId().isBlank()) {
+            throw new IllegalArgumentException("ProductDoc.id is required");
+        }
+        store.put(entity.getId(), entity);
+        return entity;
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public <S extends ProductDoc> Iterable<S> saveAll(Iterable<S> entities) {
+        List<S> saved = new ArrayList<>();
+        for (S e : entities) saved.add(save(e));
+        return saved;
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public Optional<ProductDoc> findById(String id) {
+        return Optional.ofNullable(store.get(id));
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public boolean existsById(String id) {
+        return store.containsKey(id);
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public Iterable<ProductDoc> findAll() {
+        return new ArrayList<>(store.values());
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public Iterable<ProductDoc> findAllById(Iterable<String> ids) {
+        List<ProductDoc> out = new ArrayList<>();
+        for (String id : ids) {
+            ProductDoc p = store.get(id);
+            if (p != null) out.add(p);
+        }
+        return out;
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public long count() {
+        return store.size();
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void deleteById(String id) {
+        store.remove(id);
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void delete(ProductDoc entity) {
+        if (entity != null && entity.getId() != null) store.remove(entity.getId());
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void deleteAllById(Iterable<? extends String> ids) {
+        ids.forEach(store::remove);
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void deleteAll(Iterable<? extends ProductDoc> entities) {
+        entities.forEach(this::delete);
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void deleteAll() {
+        store.clear();
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public Iterable<ProductDoc> findAll(Sort sort) {
+        return findAll();
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public Page<ProductDoc> findAll(Pageable pageable) {
+        List<ProductDoc> all = new ArrayList<>(store.values());
+        all.sort((a, b) -> a.getId().compareTo(b.getId()));
+        return paginate(all, pageable);
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public Page<ProductDoc> searchSimilar(ProductDoc entity, String[] fields, Pageable pageable) {
+        throw new UnsupportedOperationException("searchSimilar is not supported in the replit in-memory repository");
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void deleteAll(RefreshPolicy refreshPolicy) {
+        store.clear();
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void deleteAll(Iterable<? extends ProductDoc> entities, RefreshPolicy refreshPolicy) {
+        deleteAll(entities);
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void deleteAllById(Iterable<? extends String> ids, RefreshPolicy refreshPolicy) {
+        deleteAllById(ids);
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public <S extends ProductDoc> S save(S entity, RefreshPolicy refreshPolicy) {
+        return save(entity);
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public <S extends ProductDoc> Iterable<S> saveAll(Iterable<S> entities, RefreshPolicy refreshPolicy) {
+        return saveAll(entities);
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void deleteById(String id, RefreshPolicy refreshPolicy) {
+        deleteById(id);
+    }
+
+    @Override
+    public void delete(ProductDoc entity, RefreshPolicy refreshPolicy) {
+        delete(entity);
+    }
+
+    private Page<ProductDoc> paginate(List<ProductDoc> all, Pageable pageable) {
+        int from = (int) Math.min(pageable.getOffset(), all.size());
+        int to = Math.min(from + pageable.getPageSize(), all.size());
+        return new PageImpl<>(all.subList(from, to), pageable, all.size());
+    }
+}
diff --git a/src/main/java/com/example/recommendationservice/replit/InMemoryRedisTemplate.java b/src/main/java/com/example/recommendationservice/replit/InMemoryRedisTemplate.java
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..245403a
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/main/java/com/example/recommendationservice/replit/InMemoryRedisTemplate.java
@@ -0,0 +1,120 @@
+package com.example.recommendationservice.replit;
+
+import org.springframework.data.redis.core.HashOperations;
+import org.springframework.data.redis.core.RedisTemplate;
+import org.springframework.data.redis.core.ValueOperations;
+
+import java.lang.reflect.Proxy;
+import java.util.Collections;
+import java.util.HashMap;
+import java.util.Map;
+import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap;
+
+/**
+ * In-process replacement for {@link RedisTemplate} used in the {@code replit}
+ * Spring profile. The production code calls a small subset of operations
+ * (mostly {@code opsForValue().get/set} and {@code opsForHash().entries/increment})
+ * on {@code RedisTemplate<String, Object>}; we back those with concurrent maps
+ * and route any other method to a sensible default via {@link Proxy}.
+ *
+ * <p>This class deliberately does NOT require a {@code RedisConnectionFactory}
+ * ŌĆö {@link #afterPropertiesSet()} is a no-op so Spring does not error out
+ * when the Redis auto-configuration is excluded.</p>
+ */
+public class InMemoryRedisTemplate extends RedisTemplate<String, Object> {
+
+    private final Map<String, Object> values = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
+    private final Map<String, Map<Object, Long>> hashes = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
+
+    @Override
+    public void afterPropertiesSet() {
+        // no-op: we do not need a real RedisConnectionFactory in the replit profile
+    }
+
+    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
+    @Override
+    public ValueOperations<String, Object> opsForValue() {
+        return (ValueOperations<String, Object>) Proxy.newProxyInstance(
+                getClass().getClassLoader(),
+                new Class<?>[]{ValueOperations.class},
+                (proxy, method, args) -> {
+                    String name = method.getName();
+                    switch (name) {
+                        case "get":
+                            return values.get((String) args[0]);
+                        case "set":
+                            values.put((String) args[0], args[1]);
+                            return null;
+                        case "increment":
+                            Object current = values.get((String) args[0]);
+                            long delta = args.length > 1 ? ((Number) args[1]).longValue() : 1L;
+                            long next = (current instanceof Number ? ((Number) current).longValue() : 0L) + delta;
+                            values.put((String) args[0], next);
+                            return next;
+                        default:
+                            return defaultReturn(method.getReturnType());
+                    }
+                });
+    }
+
+    @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
+    @Override
+    public HashOperations<String, Object, Object> opsForHash() {
+        return (HashOperations<String, Object, Object>) Proxy.newProxyInstance(
+                getClass().getClassLoader(),
+                new Class<?>[]{HashOperations.class},
+                (proxy, method, args) -> {
+                    String name = method.getName();
+                    String key = (String) args[0];
+                    switch (name) {
+                        case "entries": {
+                            Map<Object, Long> store = hashes.get(key);
+                            if (store == null) return Collections.emptyMap();
+                            return new HashMap<Object, Object>(store);
+                        }
+                        case "increment": {
+                            Object hashKey = args[1];
+                            long delta = ((Number) args[2]).longValue();
+                            return hashes
+                                    .computeIfAbsent(key, k -> new ConcurrentHashMap<>())
+                                    .merge(hashKey, delta, Long::sum);
+                        }
+                        case "put": {
+                            hashes
+                                    .computeIfAbsent(key, k -> new ConcurrentHashMap<>())
+                                    .put(args[1], args[2] instanceof Number ? ((Number) args[2]).longValue() : 0L);
+                            return null;
+                        }
+                        case "get": {
+                            Map<Object, Long> store = hashes.get(key);
+                            return store == null ? null : store.get(args[1]);
+                        }
+                        case "delete": {
+                            Map<Object, Long> store = hashes.get(key);
+                            if (store == null) return 0L;
+                            long removed = 0L;
+                            for (int i = 1; i < args.length; i++) {
+                                if (store.remove(args[i]) != null) removed++;
+                            }
+                            return removed;
+                        }
+                        default:
+                            return defaultReturn(method.getReturnType());
+                    }
+                });
+    }
+
+    private static Object defaultReturn(Class<?> returnType) {
+        if (!returnType.isPrimitive()) return null;
+        if (returnType == boolean.class) return Boolean.FALSE;
+        if (returnType == void.class) return null;
+        if (returnType == long.class) return 0L;
+        if (returnType == int.class) return 0;
+        if (returnType == double.class) return 0d;
+        if (returnType == float.class) return 0f;
+        if (returnType == short.class) return (short) 0;
+        if (returnType == byte.class) return (byte) 0;
+        if (returnType == char.class) return '\0';
+        return null;
+    }
+}
diff --git a/src/main/java/com/example/recommendationservice/replit/ReplitMockBeansConfig.java b/src/main/java/com/example/recommendationservice/replit/ReplitMockBeansConfig.java
new file mode 100644

+++ b/src/main/java/com/example/recommendationservice/replit/ReplitMockBeansConfig.java
@@ -0,0 +1,97 @@
+package com.example.recommendationservice.replit;
+
+import org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean;
+import org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;
+import org.springframework.context.annotation.Primary;
+import org.springframework.context.annotation.Profile;
+import org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.ElasticsearchOperations;
+import org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.SearchHits;
+import org.springframework.data.redis.core.RedisTemplate;
+
+import java.lang.reflect.Method;
+import java.lang.reflect.Proxy;
+import java.util.Collections;
+
+/**
+ * Beans that replace the Elasticsearch / Redis infrastructure in the
+ * {@code replit} Spring profile. The Redis side is backed by a real
+ * {@link InMemoryRedisTemplate}; the Elasticsearch side is a
+ * {@link Proxy}-based stub that returns empty {@link SearchHits} (no
+ * aggregations, no documents) for every call.
+ *
+ * <p>The {@link com.example.recommendationservice.service.RecommendationService}
+ * already guards against {@code hits.getAggregations() == null} and falls
+ * back to an empty list, so the popular-products endpoint stays responsive
+ * even without a real cluster. The richer aggregation logic in this profile
+ * is provided by
+ * {@link com.example.recommendationservice.service.EnhancedRecommendationService},
+ * which only depends on the in-memory action repository.</p>
+ */
+@Configuration
+@Profile("replit")
+public class ReplitMockBeansConfig {
+
+    @Bean
+    @Primary
+    public RedisTemplate<String, Object> redisTemplate() {
+        return new InMemoryRedisTemplate();
+    }
+
+    @Bean
+    @Primary
+    public ElasticsearchOperations elasticsearchOperations() {
+        return (ElasticsearchOperations) Proxy.newProxyInstance(
+                getClass().getClassLoader(),
+                new Class<?>[]{ElasticsearchOperations.class},
+                (proxy, method, args) -> {
+                    if ("search".equals(method.getName())) {
+                        return emptySearchHits();
+                    }
+                    return defaultReturn(method);
+                });
+    }
+
+    private static SearchHits<?> emptySearchHits() {
+        return (SearchHits<?>) Proxy.newProxyInstance(
+                ReplitMockBeansConfig.class.getClassLoader(),
+                new Class<?>[]{SearchHits.class},
+                (proxy, method, args) -> {
+                    String name = method.getName();
+                    switch (name) {
+                        case "getAggregations":
+                            return null;
+                        case "getSearchHits":
+                        case "iterator":
+                            return Collections.emptyList().iterator();
+                        case "stream":
+                            return Collections.emptyList().stream();
+                        case "getTotalHits":
+                            return 0L;
+                        case "hasAggregations":
+                        case "isEmpty":
+                            return Boolean.TRUE;
+                        case "hasSearchHits":
+                            return Boolean.FALSE;
+                        case "getMaxScore":
+                            return 0f;
+                        default:
+                            return defaultReturn(method);
+                    }
+                });
+    }
+
+    private static Object defaultReturn(Method method) {
+        Class<?> rt = method.getReturnType();
+        if (!rt.isPrimitive()) return null;
+        if (rt == boolean.class) return Boolean.FALSE;
+        if (rt == void.class) return null;
+        if (rt == long.class) return 0L;
+        if (rt == int.class) return 0;
+        if (rt == double.class) return 0d;
+        if (rt == float.class) return 0f;
+        if (rt == short.class) return (short) 0;
+        if (rt == byte.class) return (byte) 0;
+        if (rt == char.class) return '\0';
+        return null;
+    }
+}

+package com.example.recommendationservice.replit;
+
+import com.example.recommendationservice.model.ProductDoc;
+import com.example.recommendationservice.model.UserAction;
+import com.example.recommendationservice.repository.ActionRepository;
+import com.example.recommendationservice.repository.ProductSearchRepository;
+import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
+import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
+import org.springframework.boot.CommandLineRunner;
+import org.springframework.context.annotation.Profile;
+import org.springframework.data.redis.core.RedisTemplate;
+import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
+
+import java.util.Arrays;
+import java.util.List;
+import java.util.UUID;
+
+/**
+ * Seeds a small product catalog and a few user actions on startup so that the
+ * Replit demo has visible data the moment the frontend connects. Active only
+ * in the {@code replit} profile.
+ */
+@Component
+@Profile("replit")
+@RequiredArgsConstructor
+@Slf4j
+public class SampleDataLoader implements CommandLineRunner {
+
+    private final ProductSearchRepository productRepository;
+    private final ActionRepository actionRepository;
+    private final RedisTemplate<String, Object> redisTemplate;
+
+    @Override
+    public void run(String... args) {
+        List<ProductDoc> products = Arrays.asList(
+                product("p-electronics-1", "Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones", "Electronics", 249.99,
+                        "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1518445930136-3f6c5af1f7e0?w=400"),
+                product("p-electronics-2", "Smart 4K OLED TV 55\"", "Electronics", 1199.00,
+                        "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1593359677879-a4bb92f829d1?w=400"),
+                product("p-electronics-3", "Mechanical Keyboard RGB", "Electronics", 129.50,
+                        "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1561112078-7d24e04c3407?w=400"),
+                product("p-electronics-4", "Mirrorless Camera 24MP", "Electronics", 899.00,
+                        "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1502920917128-1aa500764cbd?w=400"),
+
+                product("p-books-1", "Designing Data-Intensive Applications", "Books", 42.00,
+                        "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1544716278-ca5e3f4abd8c?w=400"),
+                product("p-books-2", "Clean Architecture", "Books", 35.00,
+                        "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1495446815901-a7297e633e8d?w=400"),
+                product("p-books-3", "The Pragmatic Programmer", "Books", 38.50,
+                        "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519682337058-a94d519337bc?w=400"),
+                product("p-books-4", "Domain-Driven Design", "Books", 49.99,
+                        "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1512820790803-83ca734da794?w=400"),
+
+                product("p-fashion-1", "Leather Trench Coat", "Fashion", 320.00,
+                        "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551488831-00ddcb6c6bd3?w=400"),
+                product("p-fashion-2", "Selvedge Denim Jeans", "Fashion", 145.00,
+                        "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542272604-787c3835535d?w=400"),
+                product("p-fashion-3", "Wool Beanie", "Fashion", 28.00,
+                        "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1576566588028-4147f3842f27?w=400"),
+                product("p-fashion-4", "Suede Chelsea Boots", "Fashion", 220.00,
+                        "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542838132-92c53300491e?w=400"),
+
+                product("p-home-1", "Espresso Machine", "Home & Garden", 599.00,
+                        "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517663154410-d27c2dec3b87?w=400"),
+                product("p-home-2", "Indoor Olive Tree", "Home & Garden", 89.00,
+                        "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1485955900006-10f4d324d411?w=400"),
+                product("p-home-3", "Cast-Iron Dutch Oven", "Home & Garden", 220.00,
+                        "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1556909114-f6e7ad7d3136?w=400"),
+                product("p-home-4", "Memory-Foam Pillow Set", "Home & Garden", 75.00,
+                        "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1505693416388-ac5ce068fe85?w=400"),
+
+                product("p-sports-1", "Carbon Road Bike", "Sports", 1850.00,
+                        "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1485965120184-e220f721d03e?w=400"),
+                product("p-sports-2", "Trail Running Shoes", "Sports", 165.00,
+                        "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542291026-7eec264c27ff?w=400"),
+                product("p-sports-3", "Yoga Mat Pro", "Sports", 65.00,
+                        "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1599447421416-3414500d18a5?w=400"),
+                product("p-sports-4", "Adjustable Dumbbells 24kg", "Sports", 320.00,
+                        "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1571019613454-1cb2f99b2d8b?w=400")
+        );
+
+        productRepository.saveAll(products);
+        log.info("[replit] Seeded {} sample products", products.size());
+
+        // Seed action history + Redis preferences. Each user interacts with the
+        // FIRST 2 products of their primary category (so 2 more remain "unseen"
+        // for content-based recommendations) plus the first product of one
+        // secondary category that overlaps with another user (so collaborative
+        // filtering can find similar users with unseen products).
+        seedUser("user1", "Electronics",   "Books");
+        seedUser("user2", "Books",         "Electronics"); // shares with user1
+        seedUser("user3", "Fashion",       "Sports");
+        seedUser("user4", "Home & Garden", "Fashion");     // shares with user3
+        seedUser("user5", "Sports",        "Books");       // shares with user1/2/3
+
+        long actionCount = 0;
+        for (var ignored : actionRepository.findAll()) actionCount++;
+        log.info("[replit] Seeded {} sample user actions", actionCount);
+    }
+
+    private void seedUser(String userId, String primaryCategory, String secondaryCategory) {
+        // 2 of 4 products in the primary category get a view + a like.
+        productRepository.findByCategory(primaryCategory,
+                org.springframework.data.domain.PageRequest.of(0, 2))
+                .forEach(p -> {
+                    actionRepository.save(new UserAction(
+                            UUID.randomUUID().toString(), userId, p.getId(), "view"));
+                    actionRepository.save(new UserAction(
+                            UUID.randomUUID().toString(), userId, p.getId(), "like"));
+                });
+
+        // 1 product in the secondary category ŌĆö used only as a collaborative
+        // overlap signal between users.
+        productRepository.findByCategory(secondaryCategory,
+                org.springframework.data.domain.PageRequest.of(0, 1))
+                .forEach(p -> actionRepository.save(new UserAction(
+                        UUID.randomUUID().toString(), userId, p.getId(), "view")));
+
+        // Seed the Redis-backed preference store so RecommendationService picks
+        // up the favorite category and EnhancedRecommendationService finds
+        // category preferences for content-based recommendations.
+        String prefsKey = "user:" + userId + ":category_preferences";
+        redisTemplate.opsForHash().increment(prefsKey, primaryCategory, 10L);
+        redisTemplate.opsForHash().increment(prefsKey, secondaryCategory, 3L);
+        redisTemplate.opsForValue().set("user:" + userId + ":fav_category", primaryCategory);
+    }
+
+    private static ProductDoc product(String id, String name, String category, double price, String imageUrl) {
+        return new ProductDoc(id, name, category, price, imageUrl);
+    }
+}

 import com.example.recommendationservice.model.RecommendationResponse;
 import com.example.recommendationservice.model.UserAction;
+import com.example.recommendationservice.repository.ActionRepository;
 import com.example.recommendationservice.repository.ProductSearchRepository;
 import lombok.RequiredArgsConstructor;
 import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;
@@ -21,7 +22,9 @@ import org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc.NativeQuery;
 import co.elastic.clients.elasticsearch._types.aggregations.Aggregation;
 
 import java.util.ArrayList;
+import java.util.HashMap;
 import java.util.List;
+import java.util.Map;

+    /**
+     * Fallback ranking computed against the action repository when the
+     * Elasticsearch aggregation returns no buckets (empty index, mocked
+     * cluster, etc.). Counts {@code view} and {@code like} actions per
+     * product and returns the top {@code limit} matches.
+     */
+    private List<ProductDoc> computePopularFromActions(int limit) {
+        Map<String, Long> productCounts = new HashMap<>();
+        for (UserAction action : actionRepository.findAll()) {
+            String type = action.getActionType();
+            if ("view".equals(type) || "like".equals(type)) {
+                productCounts.merge(action.getProductId(), 1L, Long::sum);
+            }
         }
+        if (productCounts.isEmpty()) return new ArrayList<>();
 
-        if(popularIds.isEmpty()) return new ArrayList<>();
+        List<String> ids = productCounts.entrySet().stream()
+                .sorted((a, b) -> Long.compare(b.getValue(), a.getValue()))
+                .limit(limit)
+                .map(Map.Entry::getKey)
+                .toList();
 
-        return productRepository.findAllByIdIn(popularIds);
+        return productRepository.findAllByIdIn(ids);
     }

+# Replit profile.
+#
+# The production code expects PostgreSQL + Elasticsearch + Redis + Kafka.
+# None of those external services are available inside the Replit container,
+# so this profile:
+#   * uses an embedded H2 in-memory database for JPA;
+#   * disables the Elasticsearch / Redis / Kafka auto-configurations;
+#   * relies on the in-memory beans declared in
+#     `com.example.recommendationservice.replit` (see ReplitMockBeansConfig,
+#     InMemoryProductSearchRepository, InMemoryActionRepository,
+#     InMemoryRedisTemplate, SampleDataLoader).
+#
+# Activate via SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=replit.
+spring:
+  application:
+    name: recommendation-service
+
+  # ---- JPA / Datasource ----
+  datasource:
+    url: jdbc:h2:mem:replitdb;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1;MODE=PostgreSQL
+    driver-class-name: org.h2.Driver
+    username: sa
+    password:
+  jpa:
+    hibernate:
+      ddl-auto: create-drop
+    show-sql: false
+    properties:
+      hibernate:
+        format_sql: false
+
+  # ---- Disable infra we don't have in Replit ----
+  autoconfigure:
+    exclude:
+      - org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.elasticsearch.ElasticsearchRestClientAutoConfiguration
+      - org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.data.elasticsearch.ElasticsearchDataAutoConfiguration
+      - org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.data.elasticsearch.ElasticsearchRepositoriesAutoConfiguration
+      - org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.data.elasticsearch.ReactiveElasticsearchRepositoriesAutoConfiguration
+      - org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.data.redis.RedisAutoConfiguration
+      - org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.data.redis.RedisReactiveAutoConfiguration
+      - org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.data.redis.RedisRepositoriesAutoConfiguration
+      - org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.kafka.KafkaAutoConfiguration
+
+logging:
+  level:
+    com.example.recommendationservice: INFO
+    org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure: WARN
+    org.hibernate.SQL: WARN
+
+server:
+  # Replit only exposes a fixed allow-list of TCP ports inside the workspace.
+  # Port 8080 is the standard non-webview port and matches the CRA proxy
+  # configured in frontend/package.json.
+  port: 8080
+  shutdown: graceful
+
+# Replit ingress proxies the React frontend on port 5000 over HTTPS through
+# a *.replit.dev hostname, but inside the container the frontend is reached
+# through the Create React App proxy (package.json -> "proxy"), so calls to
+# the backend arrive at this Spring Boot process via http://localhost:8026.
+# We still allow the public Replit hostname for direct curl/Swagger usage.
+management:
+  endpoints:
+    web:
+      exposure:
+        include: health,info,metrics,prometheus
+  endpoint:
+    health:
+      show-details: always
+      probes:
+        enabled: true
+  health:
+    livenessstate:
+      enabled: true
+    readinessstate:
+      enabled: true
+
+eureka:
+  client:
+    register-with-eureka: false
+    fetch-registry: false
